project.name: Bedrock Lambda GitHub PR Review App Architecture
project.description:
This document describes a GitHub App that reviews pull requests using AWS Bedrock and Lambda.
The authored functional architecture remains stable while deployment/runtime/code evidence is inferred
from infrastructure manifests, source files, and verification artifacts.

trustZones.name: AWS Control Boundary
trustZones.description: Boundary between app workloads and privileged platform controls.

trustZones.name: GitHub External Boundary
trustZones.description: Boundary between external GitHub traffic and internal review processing.

components.name: Developer
components.description: Opens pull requests and receives review feedback.

components.name: Platform Operator
components.description: Operates Lambda deployment and runtime controls.

components.name: Repository Maintainer
components.description: Owns merge decisions and repository-level quality gates.

components.name: Security Engineer
components.description: Curates policy checks and triages security findings.

components.name: GitHub Integration Boundary
components.description: external global

components.name: Primary Lambda Runtime
components.description: prod us-east-1

components.name: GitHub Webhook Ingress
components.description: Verifies webhook signatures, validates event type, and starts review workflow routing.

components.name: Lambda Runtime Operations
components.description: Manages Lambda packaging/deployment lifecycle and operational health guardrails.

components.name: Policy Checks
components.description: Runs deterministic checks for secrets, risky IaC changes, and repository policy constraints.

components.name: PR Context Assembly
components.description: Fetches changed files and diff metadata and prepares bounded review context payloads.

components.name: Review Orchestration
components.description: Calls Bedrock models, merges AI and deterministic findings, and handles graceful degradation paths.

components.name: Review Publication
components.description: Publishes check-run summaries and inline comments back to GitHub pull requests.

components.name: Secrets and Configuration
components.description: Manages GitHub App credentials, Bedrock config, and redaction-safe runtime configuration.

components.name: Review Publish API
components.description: https /github/check-runs

components.name: Webhook Intake API
components.description: https /webhook/github

components.name: AWS Bedrock Runtime API
components.description: runtime

components.description: code

components.name: AWS Secrets Manager
components.description: runtime

components.name: GitHub App API
components.description: runtime

components.description: code

components.name: Review Policy Ruleset
components.description: code

threats.name: Prompt injection in diff influences review output integrity
threats.description: Malicious prompts in diff content attempt to coerce model output away from policy intent.

threats.name: Sensitive tokens leak via review publication payload
threats.description: Review output includes sensitive content due to incomplete redaction before publication.

threats.name: Spoofed webhook bypasses ingress verification
threats.description: Forged pull request webhook attempts to trigger unauthorized review execution.

mitigations.name: CTRL-BEDROCK-WEBHOOK-SIGNATURE
mitigations.description: Context sanitizer and deterministic policy checks reduce injection impact; coverage expansion continues.

mitigations.name: CTRL-BEDROCK-SECRETS-ROTATION
mitigations.description: Publication redaction pipeline blocks common secret shapes and is being extended.

mitigations.name: CTRL-BEDROCK-WEBHOOK-SIGNATURE
mitigations.description: HMAC signature checks and ingress rejection reduce spoofing attack viability.
